Co,PC,Yr,BusCat,Flex3,Division,Location,RefKey1,Flex1,Flex2,Assgnmt,CC,Txt,Ledger,Qtr
Co,Doc Nbr,Year,Doc Type,Expected,Post Date,Entry Date,Posted By,Tcode,Cross Co Nbr,Reference,Reversed with,Doc Hdr Txt,Ledger Grp,Doc Cnt
Co,PC
update TransX set Flex2 = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex2 = 'x'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'REVAL' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat in ('FR')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'IDOC' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'FE' and Assgnmt like 'CB97%'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'REV' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(CC) > 1 and cast(PC as float) - cast(CC as float) > 0 and substring(PC,1,2) = substring(CC,1,2)
update TransX set Flex3 = 'IDOC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Assgnmt in ('IR LEDGER LOAD','BALANCE LOAD')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'REVAL' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Assgnmt = '' and BusCat = 'FE' and Co = '2006'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'SAP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and len(Flex2)>2 and substring(Flex2,12,4) <> Co
update TransX set Flex3 = 'IDOC' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Txt like '%IBNR%'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'SAP' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'AB' and Flex1 in ('FB1S','FB1K','F110')
update TransX set Flex3 = 'CONV' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'ZD'
update TransX set Flex3 = 'CLEAR' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'FB05'
update x set Flex3 = 'parked' from TransX x inner join ParkerLog p on x.PC = p.DocNbr and x.Co = p.Co where KeyID = '[batchID]' and p.ParkedBy <> ''
update TransX set Flex3 = 'z-Direct Post' where KeyID = '[batchID]' and coalesce(Flex3,'') = ''
